channel.title: Achievements on Crime Empire Guide
channel.description: Recent content in Achievements on Crime Empire Guide

item.title: DDS2 Achievement Guide: Full List (39 Achievements Verified)
item.description:
Drug Dealer Simulator 2 has 39 Steam achievements (confirmed on the official Steam page). Achievement tracking sites like TrueAchievements and Steam Hunters document the full list. Here is the verified guide to unlocking them.

All Achievements by Category

Based on data from Steam Hunters and PlayTracker achievement tracking sites.

Story and Progression Achievements:

Achievement Unlock Condition Unlock Rate (Steam)
I Am The One Who Knocks Achieve Street Cred level 4 Common
Higher learning Progress through story Common
The Kingpin Reach max Street Cred Rare
Side hustle Complete side missions ~0.6% (rare)

Collectible and Misc Achievements:

item.title: DDS2 Hidden and Secret Achievements (Verified via Steam Trackers)
item.description:
DDS2 has several achievements with hidden unlock conditions. By cross-referencing Steam community guides (including the "EN Achievements 100%" guide) and tracking sites, we can piece together the requirements for the hardest-to-unlock achievements.

Achievements with Unknown Conditions

Several achievements on Steam Hunters and PlayTracker have descriptions that do not clearly state their unlock conditions:

Achievement Possible Trigger (Community Guesses) Rarity
Never let you down Complete a specific quest chain Very rare
A warm place Related to hideout upgrades or specific location Very rare
Home sweet home Fully upgrade a hideout Rare
Side hustle Complete all available side missions 0.6%
500 CIGARETTES Sell 500 cigarettes total 0.7%

DLC Achievements

The Casino DLC (released June 2025) adds additional achievements. The Steam community 100% guide notes that one involves killing the casino boss with a bomb and paying B4,000,000 afterward.
